---
title: "preprocessing"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-24"
---

```{r}
rnaseq[rnaseq <= 10] <- NA

```

```{r}
# Load required library
library(ggplot2)

# Count NA percentage for each column (patient)
na_percentage <- colMeans(is.na(rnaseq)) * 100

# Convert to a data frame for plotting
na_df <- data.frame(NA_Percentage = na_percentage)

# Plot density plot for smooth distribution
ggplot(na_df, aes(x = NA_Percentage)) +
  geom_density(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +  # Density plot with smoothing
  labs(title = "Density Plot of NA Percentage per Patient",
       x = "NA Percentage",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

# Count NA percentage for each column (patient)
na_percentage <- colMeans(is.na(rnaseq)) * 100

# Get column names where NA percentage is greater than 75%
high_na_cols <- names(na_percentage[na_percentage > 80])

# Print the column names
print(high_na_cols)
```

```{r}
# Remove rows from samplesheet where sample_id is in high_na_cols
samplesheet_filtered1 <- samplesheet[!(samplesheet$sample_id %in% high_na_cols), ]

# Print the updated samplesheet
print(samplesheet_filtered1)
table(samplesheet_filtered1$class)


```


```{r}
rnaseq_filtered1 <- rnaseq[, colnames(rnaseq) %in% samplesheet_filtered1$sample_id]
rnaseq_filtered1
rownames(rnaseq_filtered1) <- rnaseq$gene_id
rnaseq_filtered1

```
```{r}
rnaseq
```


```{r}
rna_matrix_filtered2 <- rnaseq_filtered1[rowMeans(is.na(rnaseq_filtered1)) <= 0.01, ]
rna_matrix_filtered2
```

```{r}
any(is.na(rna_matrix_filtered2))
```



```{r}
# Load required package
library(impute)

# Perform KNN imputation with k = 5
rna_matrix_imputed <- impute.knn(as.matrix(rna_matrix_filtered2), k = 5)$data
rna_matrix_imputed <- as.data.frame(rna_matrix_imputed)
rna_matrix_imputed

```



```{r}
any(is.na(rna_matrix_imputed))

```

```{r}
any(duplicated(rownames(rna_matrix_imputed)))
```


```{r}
rna_matrix_imputed_copy <- rna_matrix_imputed
```

```{r}

# Remove everything after the dot in rownames
rownames(rna_matrix_imputed) <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(rna_matrix_imputed))

# Handle duplicate rownames by making them unique
rownames(rna_matrix_imputed) <- make.unique(rownames(rna_matrix_imputed))

rna_matrix_imputed


```

```{r}
rna_matrix_imputed_copy2 <- rna_matrix_imputed
```

```{r}
is(an)
```

```{r}

library(biomaRt)

# Connect to Ensembl database
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")  # Change dataset if needed

# Get mapping of Ensembl IDs to Gene Names
gene_mapping <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"), 
                      filters = "ensembl_gene_id", 
                      values = rownames(rna_matrix_imputed), 
                      mart = mart)

# Ensure all Ensembl IDs are mapped properly
gene_mapping <- gene_mapping[gene_mapping$hgnc_symbol != "", ]  # Remove empty gene names

# Create a named vector for mapping
id_to_gene <- setNames(gene_mapping$hgnc_symbol, gene_mapping$ensembl_gene_id)

# Copy the matrix before modifying rownames
rna_matrix_genes <- rna_matrix_imputed

# Replace Ensembl IDs with Gene Names, keeping original IDs if missing
new_rownames <- ifelse(rownames(rna_matrix_genes) %in% names(id_to_gene),
                        id_to_gene[rownames(rna_matrix_genes)],
                        rownames(rna_matrix_genes))

rownames(rna_matrix_genes) <- new_rownames

# Ensure rownames are unique
rownames(rna_matrix_genes) <- make.unique(rownames(rna_matrix_genes))

rna_matrix_genes


```




```{r}
norma
```
